---
applyTo: "**/*.{md,mdx}"
description: "Enforce Radix documentation style when editing markdown files. Covers tone, American English, formatting, and content policy."
---

When editing documentation files, always follow the radix-docs skill guidelines. Review all changes for American English spelling, active voice, professional conversational tone, minimal emoji usage, and no Equinor-specific internal policies. Content should focus on Radix platform usage and configuration.
